revision.comment: Minor edit.
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (6 members)
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 15:48:27
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
revision.text:
==Old Content== ==Old Content== ==Old Content== {{Commonscat}} {{Cat main|Feature (archaeology)}} Articles on individual archaeological [[:en:Feature (archaeology)|features]] that constitute [[:en:Archaeological sites|Archaeological sites]]. {{Category see also|Archaeological sites}}
[[en:Category:Archaeological features]] [[Category:Archaeology of structures]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]].↵" to " "
Adding [[Category:undo 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Removing from [[Category:Undo 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Commonscat}} {{Cat main|Feature (archaeology)}} Articles on individual archaeological [[:en:Feature (archaeology)|features]] that constitute [[:en:Archaeological sites|Archaeological sites {{Category see also|Archaeological sites}}
==Categories==
[[en:Category:Archaeological features]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Archaeology of structures]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9784716)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9784716)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Commonscat}}
{{Cat main|Feature (archaeology)}}
{{Category see also|Archaeological sites}}
{{wikidata link|Q9784716}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:Archaeological features]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Archaeology of structures]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Archaeological_features here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

{{Category see also|Archaeological sites}}
